title: Zero In Bed Bug & Dust Mite Killer - 300ml Aerosol. Ready-To-Use. Prevents Allergies, Long-Lasting Protection for Over 2 weeks Treats Mattresses, Beds and Furniture (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack

EFFECTIVE BED BUG KILLER – Get quick relief with Zero In Bed Bug Spray & Dust Mite Killer. This potent formula kills bed bugs and dust mites on contact, offering immediate results. Continued protection ensures a long-lasting solution, preventing re-infestations for a more comfortable home

PREVENTS ALLERGIES – Sleep peacefully with our powerful bug spray designed to target areas that harbour allergens like mattresses, bed frames and skirting boards. This effective bed bug killer spray eliminates insect hideaways, promoting a healthier, allergen-free environment

LONG-LASTING PROTECTION – Experience over two weeks of consistent protection with our bed bugs treatment spray. Formulated with Cyphenothrin and Prallethrin, this reliable mite spray provides prolonged efficacy, reducing the need for frequent re-applications and keeping your home safeguarded

FOR INDOOR USE – Specially crafted for indoor areas, this dust mite spray maintains a fresh environment with a natural floral fragrance. It adds a pleasant scent while keeping pests at bay. Always test on a small, inconspicuous area first to ensure it won't stain your mattresses or carpets

CARING FOR PEOPLE & THE PLANET – Zero In protects your health and home against Home Pest problems with minimal environmental impact. Zero In products are ethical and welfare-friendly solutions to everyday Home Pest problems that safeguard your well-being. We care for you, your family, and the planet
description: From the manufacturer TARGETS HOUSEHOLD PESTS Zero In brings you a comprehensive range of pest control solutions for household pests, including flies, wasps, mosquitoes, bed bugs, fleas, clothes moths and more. Everything you need to live pest-free Professional-quality products you can trust Experts in pest control for over 25 years Zero In Bed Bug & Dust Mite Killer Spray – 300ml Long-lasting protection from bed bugs Protect yourself, your family and your home from bed bugs and help prevent allergies caused by dust mites with Zero In Bed Bug & Dust Mite Killer Spray. The advanced formula kills both bed bugs and dust mites to provide long-term treatment of up to 12 months, leaving a natural fragrance behind, when used on mattresses, beds and household furniture. Not for direct application to clothing or fabrics. Contains 1-r-transphenothrin and tetramethrin. Long-lasting protection from bed bugs and dust mites. For use on mattresses, beds and household furniture. Natural fragrance. Contains 1R-trans phenothrin and tetramethrin. Product Highlights Long-Lasting Protection Enjoy a good night's sleep with up to 12 months protection from every application. Kills Bed Bugs Kills bed bugs and dust mites to help stop infestations, discomfort and prevent the spread of allergens they may cause. Natural Fragrance Leave treated rooms feeling fresh and clean with a natural floral scent from the spray. All-Round Protection Zero In brings you a wide range of control solutions including poison-free traps, aerosols and powders to effectively tackle household pests, including bed bugs, carpet beetles, woodworm, and many more. Understanding Bed Bugs Signs of Bed Bugs Bed bugs cause bites to the skin, mainly around the ankles or exposed areas whilst sleeping. These bites don't generally cause lasting harm but can be itchy and sore. Other tell-tale signs include dark/rusty spots of bed bug excrement on sheets, mattresses and bed clothes. A musty odour caused by the bugs' scent glands may also be noticed. Causes of Bed Bugs Bed bugs aren't necessarily related to uncleanliness but as a result of lifestyle with many bed bugs hitch-hiking from place to place via luggage, clothing and belongings. Be careful where you leave your bags and cases when staying in hotels or other accommodation. Treatment & Prevention Help prevent their arrival by repairing cracks in walls and removing clutter where they may hide. Vacuum carpets regularly and along skirting. Use Zero In Bed Bug Traps to monitor for infestation and the range of sprays and powders to treat areas where activity has been seen or recorded.
